Note:
- Not accepted: Shipments with a length exceeding 240 cm, or (Length + 2 × (Width + Height)) exceeding 300 cm.
- Not accepted: Seafood and aquatic products; liquid cosmetics; liquid dietary supplements; powder, meat, eggs, milk; counterfeit/fake goods; and items prohibited under government regulations.
- The above rates include fuel surcharge and VAT 0%, exclude other surcharges (remote area surcharge, address correction fee, oversize surcharge, etc.).
- The above rates exclude duties, taxes, and charges at destination (if any).
- Volumetric weight formula:
- Freight charges are calculated based on the higher of actual weight or volumetric weight.
- Additional Handling Surcharge: VND 1,050,000 per bill
If a shipment falls under any of the conditions below, it will be charged with a minimum chargeable weight of 18 kg per piece plus the additional handling surcharge:
1.  -The longest side exceeds 120 cm, the second-longest side exceeds 76 cm, or (Length + 2 × (Width + Height)) exceeds 266 cm.
2.  Shipments not packed in cartons or with irregular shapes, such as metal items, buckets, basins, round or cylindrical packages.
- Address correction fee: VND 575,000
- U.S. Import Processing Fee: VND 43,000 per shipment
This fee applies to all international shipments imported into the United States for customs clearance processing.
- Pickup surcharge (applicable only when SGLINK staff collect shipments directly at the shipper’s address):
1. Fewer than 10 shipments per pickup: VND 50,000 per pickup
2. 10 shipments or more per pickup: Free of charge
- Remote Area Surcharge
1. Tier A: 160,000 vnd/bill
2. Tier B: 1,200,000 vnd/bill
3. Tier C: 1,600,000 vnd/bil
